title: phreatia deltoides
intro: Phreatia deltoides, also known as the Deltoid Phreatia or Deltoid Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. Native to the tropical regions of Asia, it is a terrestrial orchid that grows in shaded areas, often in rocky or wooded environments. The plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. In traditional medicine, Phreatia deltoides is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or powder for its health benefits.
